description: Create a five-column content slide titled 'Some key numbers on the outlook for 2025' with donut charts for Environment, Economy, Society, Technology, and Security, each showing a headline percentage and explanatory text.

header.headline: Some key numbers on the outlook for 2025

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Environment
steps.sub: On average across 31 countries say “Average global temperatures will increase”, down from 81% last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Economy
steps.sub: On average across 31 countries say “Prices in ... [COUNTRY] will increase faster than people's incomes”, unchanged from last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Society
steps.sub: On average across 31 countries say “The level of immigration into my country will increase”, down from 71% last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Technology
steps.sub: On average across 31 countries say “Artificial Intelligence will lead to many new jobs being lost in my country”, up from 64% last year.

steps.label: The outlook for 2025: Security
steps.sub: On average across 31 countries say “There will be a new global pandemic caused by a new virus”, down from 48% last year.
